title: St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune
tagline: St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune is a much-loved heritage city in Maharashtra, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: St. Patrick's Cathedral is a Roman Catholic religious building located adjacent to the 'Empress Garden' in Pune, India). Built in neo-gothic style in the middle of the 19th century, it was adopted as 'cathedral' church when Pune (then Poona) was made diocese (1886), of which it is still the main church. It also has the highest number of parishioners of the Pune diocese.

topPlaces.name: Roman Catholic Diocese of Poona
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Poona is a diocese located in the city of Pune in the ecclesiastical province of Archdiocese of Mumbai in India. The Poona Diocese consists of the civil districts of Pune, Satara, Solapur, Sangli & Kolhapur city.

topPlaces.name: Fatimanagar
topPlaces.description: Fatima Nagar is a neighbourhood in Pune. The neighbourhood derives its name from the "Congregation of Sisters of Our Lady of Fatima" located here.

topPlaces.name: Pune Race Course
topPlaces.description: Pune Race Course is a racecourse located in Pune Cantonment, western India. It is located 5–6 km from downtown Pune and 12–13 km from Pune airport.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Church, Pune
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Church is Protestant church located in the Pune Cantonment, Maharashtra state, India.

topPlaces.name: National War Memorial Southern Command
topPlaces.description: The National War Memorial Southern Command is a war memorial in the city of Pune, India, dedicated to post-Independence war martyrs. This is the only war memorial in South Asia which has been erected by citizens' contributions.

topPlaces.name: Pune Club Ground
topPlaces.description: The Pune Club Ground or Poona Club Ground is a cricket ground in Pune, Maharashtra. It has been used for first-class cricket since 1935, most recently for a Ranji Trophy match between Maharashtra and Railways in 2001.

topPlaces.name: Pune Tribal Museum
topPlaces.description: Pune Tribal Museum is located in the city of Pune, Maharashtra, India. The Museum was established in the year 1962 as an extension of Tribal Research and Training Institute, Pune, started display in year 1965 and exhibits the culture of the Maharashtrian tribes.

topPlaces.name: Ohel David Synagogue
topPlaces.description: Ohel David (Tabernacle of David) Synagogue, also called Laal Deval or Laal Deul is a synagogue in Pune, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (8 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (3 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune?
faq.a: Stays in St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Patrick's Cathedral, Pune?
faq.a: The top attractions are Roman Catholic Diocese of Poona, Fatimanagar, Pune Race Course, St. Mary's Church, Pune, National War Memorial Southern Command.
